fragments.name: generated-boundary
fragments.description: Derived integrity view for committed generated classes and their non-authoritative boundary.

fragments.name: build-boundary
fragments.description: Derived integrity view for ephemeral build outputs and their non-authority rule.

fragments.name: drift-evidence
fragments.description: Derived integrity view for committed drift reports across executed slices.

notes: Authoritative source module for the drift-integrity surface slice. It consumes committed drift evidence and generated/build boundary declarations to render a derived integrity registry.
